ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "best_estimate" REAL /* The best estimate solution for the current generation */,
  "ground_truth" REAL /* The ground truth value for the problem landscape */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy measure of the current generation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subpopulations" (
  "subpopulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subpopulation */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation this subpopulation belongs to */,
  "genome" TEXT /* Genome sequence of the subpopulation */,
  "best_estimate" REAL /* The best estimate solution for the subpopulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subpopulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subpopulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subpopulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subpopulations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome sequence */,
  "genome_sequence" TEXT /* The actual genome sequence */,
  "best_estimate" REAL /* The best estimate solution for the genome */,
  "ground_truth" REAL /* The ground truth value for the genome */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy measure of the genome */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness of the genome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_landscapes" (
  "landscape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem landscape */,
  "landscape_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem landscape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem landscape */,
  "ground_truth" REAL /* Ground truth value for the problem landscape */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem landscape was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem landscape was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landscape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic operator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic operator */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the genetic operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genetic operator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genetic operator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "landscape_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the problem landscape used in the simulation */,
  "operator_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of genetic operator IDs used in the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_landscape_id FOREIGN KEY ("landscape_id") REFERENCES problem_landscapes ("landscape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation that produced the result */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation that produced the result */,
  "best_estimate" REAL /* The best estimate solution for the result */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy measure of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., start, stop, view results) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_execution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator execution log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation that executed the operator */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genetic operator that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator was executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the operator was executed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operator execution log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operator execution log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_execution_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES genetic_operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_execution_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation that uses this parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the simulation parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome mutation */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genome that underwent the mutation */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, insertion, deletion) */,
  "mutation_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome mutation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome mutation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_mutations_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)
